upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The eta-bounded leakage class widens the parent eta=0 premise, but the headline iff frontier is mostly the definition of eta_w^*(P) as the first contact radius rather than a non-definitional regime-opening theorem.

repo_prior_art.cite: parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: inclusion/common-cumulant-matching boundary at eta=0

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021: common-restriction LP/VAR equivalence including sign restrictions

repo_prior_art.cite: parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: support gap controlled by cumulant-contact failure; eta_w^*(P) repackages the boundary as a leakage radius

published_prior_art.cite: LanneLiuLuoto2026: dependent-shock co-moment identification frontier, but no LP/sign versus higher-cumulant SVAR critical leakage radius

repo_prior_art.cite: parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: two-shock witness; upgrade adds eta-leakage residual and reflection-component bookkeeping

published_prior_art.cite: Guay2021: higher-moment local rank conditions, not an LP-support-angle leakage formula

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: PN2 generalization is only partial: eta_w^*(P) is defined as the minimum eta at which an exposed LP maximizer enters Q_eta(P), so the iff equality frontier follows from nested compact support sets; tier=field below novelty_target=flagship unless the revision adds a non-definitional primitive boundary.

soundness_flags.label: Locked parameters
soundness_flags.one_line: The locked block labels the anchor as ExactID while the formal object is a support-function/bounding-functional comparison over set-valued sign restrictions, and the parent v1 lock was partial-identification style.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Rewrite Conjecture 1 so the flagship content is not the definition of eta_w^*(P): state primitive observable rank/transversality inequalities under which eta_w^*(P) is positive, finite, and strictly smaller/larger than a named published comparator boundary.

Fix the locked anchor: either declare this a PartialID support-function proposal consistently, or restate the target as an ExactID functional with a named identifying formula rather than a set-valued support comparison.
Promote Conjecture 2 into the operational flagship by giving the explicit two-shock quartic residual and a sharp nonzero open interval of eta values where LP/sign and cumulant-SVAR supports differ.

recommended_next_step: Revise the kernel to make the leakage frontier primitive rather than definitional, and align the anchor cluster before another review.
